description:
Authors: Collins, L. and Parulekar, A. and Mokhtari, A. and Sanghavi, S. and Shakkottai, S.
Title: In-Context Learning with Transformers: Softmax Attention Adapts to Function Lipschitzness
Conference/Book: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
reason: Paper confirmed via CrossRef, OpenAlex, and arXiv with matching title, venue (NeurIPS 2024), and partial author match. Minor discrepancies in author list (missing Shakkottai, name expansion of L. to Liam, order variation) are common in academic publishing but do not invalidate the existence of the work.
